phases.intro_dialogue: Nulla repeats the old static-door pattern.

suhas_bar_fight.bullet_legend: Read the floor flash before stools, gummies, and guitar picks arrive.

phases.intro_dialogue: Suhas kicks away the stool and sends gummy bowls raining from the rafters.
phases.readability_hint: Pink floor marks show where the heavy bowls will land.

patterns.safe_hint: Move under an unmarked ceiling gap.

phases.intro_dialogue: Suhas calls the fight unprovoked. His bike keys disagree and ricochet around the bar.
phases.readability_hint: Each key flashes at its next rebound point.

patterns.safe_hint: Let the key pass, then move into its old lane.

phases.intro_dialogue: Suhas tears one final chord from the guitar he refuses to surrender.
phases.readability_hint: Notes travel on visible staff lines. Change lanes between measures.

patterns.safe_hint: Follow the empty beat between note groups.

srmt_final_boss.bullet_legend: Five readable movements recall every district before the guitar counterpoint.

phases.intro_dialogue: SRMT signs the harbour away without looking up from the bucket.
phases.readability_hint: Stamped columns fall first; broken rings follow their open side.

patterns.safe_hint: Pass through each broken ring opening.

phases.intro_dialogue: The throne broadcasts a smile too wide for any living face.
phases.readability_hint: Banana arcs leave a calm wedge behind each cheerful pulse.

patterns.safe_hint: Follow the dark wedge behind the yellow arc.
Change rings only after the smile flickers.

phases.intro_dialogue: Berry Barks rises through the court floor, roots carrying every unpaid promise.
phases.readability_hint: Glowing roots mark the sweep direction before berry clusters burst.

patterns.safe_hint: Cross behind the root after its glow passes.
The unlit patch stays safe for one full beat.

phases.intro_dialogue: Hospital grids become festival lights. SRMT conducts both with one hand.
phases.readability_hint: Clinical lines flash once; festival beams sweep on the second pulse.

patterns.safe_hint: Choose the lane without a second pulse.

phases.intro_dialogue: Shrububu raises the guitar. The court answers in counterpoint.
phases.readability_hint: Gold notes are the melody. Hold their lane and answer between phrases.

patterns.safe_hint: Stay between the paired notes, then cross on the rest.
Each district color repeats its original safe rule.
